title: Squirrel Removal Franklin Square
metaDescription: Professional squirrel removal services in Franklin Square, Long Island. Expert wildlife control for homes and businesses. Fast response, humane removal. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Franklin Square homeowners know that squirrels can quickly become a nuisance when they invade attics, crawl spaces, and wall voids. Our professional squirrel removal services protect Franklin Square properties from damage caused by these persistent rodents. We provide humane, effective squirrel control solutions tailored to the unique needs of Long Island homes.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Franklin Square and surrounding Long Island communities for years with licensed, insured wildlife removal specialists. Our team understands the specific squirrel challenges facing Franklin Square residents and delivers fast, reliable service with guaranteed results.
localContext: Franklin Square's tree-lined streets and mix of Cape Cod and Colonial-style homes provide ideal habitats for gray squirrels seeking shelter, especially near areas like Rath Park and the residential neighborhoods surrounding New Hyde Park Road. The mature oak and maple trees common throughout Franklin Square make attic and roof invasions particularly frequent during fall and spring nesting seasons.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal services in Franklin Square typically range from $900 to $2,500, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes inspection, humane trapping and removal, entry point sealing, and sanitation services.

faqs.question: What are signs of squirrels in my Franklin Square attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in the attic or walls, especially during early morning or evening hours, visible entry holes near roof lines or soffits, droppings in the attic, chewed wiring or insulation, and squirrels seen entering or exiting your roof area.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal services humane in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use only humane, live-catch trapping methods that comply with New York State wildlife regulations. Squirrels are safely relocated away from residential areas, and we seal entry points to prevent future invasions without harming the animals.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to squirrel problems in Franklin Square?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for Franklin Square residents in most cases. Squirrel infestations can worsen quickly, causing structural damage and creating health hazards, so we prioritize rapid response to protect your home and family.
